## Task 1: Loot/Powerup System

**Created** `/mnt/data/commons-server/src/dungeon/loot.ts`:
- `LootItem` interface with id, slug, name, description, statModifier (Record<string, number>), rarity
- `LootRegistry` class with methods: `loadFromDB()`, `registerItem()`, `clearAndReplace()`, `getById()`, `generateChoices(count, floorNumber, rng)`
- Weighted rarity selection: common 60%, uncommon 30%, rare 10%, with per-floor bias toward better rarity...(truncated)
